decision.summary: A weekly $78k reach position was already opened very recently, so this cycle should not duplicate the same thesis.
decision.rationale: The latest Beecthor thesis still supports another upside leg first, but the context snapshot already includes a successful OPEN_POSITION cycle at 2026-04-16T17:31:06Z for `will-bitcoin-reach-78k-april-13-19` Yes with performed execution. Even though open_positions has not yet reflected it, the recent trade log shows that the weekly slot has effectively just been used. Under the playbook, only one new position should be opened per cycle and the weekly slot should not be duplicated. The correct action is to wait for account state and phone execution state to settle before considering any further trade.
